'''thakugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetonotidan|chaetonotidan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetonotidan|chaetonotidan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thakugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thækigith|thækigith]] || [[word:thækigij|thækigij]] || [[word:thækigish|thækigish]] || [[word:thækigi|thækigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thakukuguth|thakukuguth]] || [[word:thakukuguj|thakukuguj]] || [[word:thakukugush|thakukugush]] || [[word:thakukugu|thakukugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakuguth|thakuguth]] || [[word:thakuguj|thakuguj]] || [[word:thakugush|thakugush]] || [[word:thakugu|thakugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakufguth|thakufguth]] || [[word:thakufguj|thakufguj]] || [[word:thakufgush|thakufgush]] || [[word:thakufguf|thakufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thakuguthu|thakuguthu]] || [[word:thakuguju|thakuguju]] || [[word:thakugushu|thakugushu]] || [[word:thakuguku|thakuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thakuguth|thakuguth]] || [[word:thakuguj|thakuguj]] || [[word:thakugush|thakugush]] || [[word:thakugu|thakugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thakuguthul|thakuguthul]] || [[word:thakugujul|thakugujul]] || [[word:thakugushul|thakugushul]] || [[word:thakugukul|thakugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thakuguthuthu|thakuguthuthu]] || [[word:thakugujuju|thakugujuju]] || [[word:thakugushushu|thakugushushu]] || [[word:thakuguku|thakuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thakuguthun|thakuguthun]] || [[word:thakugujun|thakugujun]] || [[word:thakugushun|thakugushun]] || [[word:thakugukun|thakugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thakuguthuoro|thakuguthuoro]] || [[word:thakugujuoro|thakugujuoro]] || [[word:thakugushuoro|thakugushuoro]] || [[word:thakugukuoro|thakugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
